summary: Successfully tested CIPOLATTI Access Control System photo upload/download functionality after local storage fix. All photo upload endpoints working correctly with local storage at /app/uploads/. Backend testing completed with 100% success rate.

resolved_issues.description: Main agent successfully changed from remote storage (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) to local storage (/app/uploads/)
resolved_issues.verification: All 24 photos uploaded successfully and saved to correct directories

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing not performed as requested - focus was on backend photo functionality only

passed_tests: Uploaded 9 photos for carregamentos (3 photos each, categories: geral, placa, motorista)
Uploaded 9 photos for frota saida (3 photos each, categories: placa, motorista, frente)
Uploaded 6 photos for frota retorno (3 photos each, categories: traseira, lateral, interior)
Verified all 24 photos saved correctly in /app/uploads/ with proper directory structure
Verified GET requests return all images correctly (825 bytes each)
Verified carregamentos have photos attached for printing (3 photos each)
Verified frota records have photos attached for printing (3-6 photos each)
Photo retrieval via API working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested (backend focus only as requested)
